experiment_4.Task: Run an ATAC-seq chromatin accessibility workflow in Galaxy on paired-end reads and report key workflow execution details.
experiment_4.Prompt: I have paired-end ATAC-seq FASTQ files and want to run a chromatin-accessibility workflow in Galaxy. Please use validated Galaxy resources if available, choose an appropriate workflow, run it, and for reproducibility report the analysis type, the required input format, the final coverage-style artifact format, and the number of workflow tool steps in the workflow you actually ran.
